title: French Crumble Almond Coffee Cake
description: A sweet breakfast treat with a crumbly almond topping, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, granulated sugar, and ground almonds.
In a large bowl, whisk together softened butter, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until just combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Top with crumbly topping and bake for 35-40 minutes.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
